title: Modern Classic Villagers
body:
![Modern Classic Villagers (Cover)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a50e2e1619ad7843e0dcc66a7b2e887f4007d4_0.webp)

Modern Classic Villagers is a resource pack designed to bring back the classic vibe of Villagers, but post Village and Pillage and JAPPA's texture update!

![three classic Villagers, reborn!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ae1a8cfb149d752c7ef87ed0f01198108e1ca1.png)

Instead of being donned in hats and other accessories, Villagers are back to either wearing a colored robe or arpon of some kind. Liberties were taken with some of the new professions that didn't exist prior to 1.14, such as the Cartographer and Fishermen.

![leatherworker, mason, and weaponsmith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a765ef06cb19d1ce8366a656b44b9d88d3f05758.png)

Jobless Villagers were redesigned to still be identifiable from one another, despite their now dressed-down appearance!

![jobless plains, snowy, and savanna villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7253ae057b5a728dc6d9d0ad1f221c7287a967da.png)

**As always, feedback is welcome and I will try to keep this pack updated to the current version of Minecraft**
